Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JIANQIN WU's Motion To Set Aside The Request For Default Against Him.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion by Jianqin Wu to set aside entry of default is granted. The proposed answer attached to the Treppa declaration shall be filed within 10 days.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
